purpose: Prevent double-wrapper restores and partial extraction promotion for MetaBlooms full OS exports.
restore_rules: Wrapped archives must be restored to the parent directory that will contain the wrapper directory.
Restore tools must reject a destination parent whose basename equals the wrapper directory unless an explicit reviewed override is supplied.
Restore must extract to a temporary staging directory before replacing any existing runtime root.
Restore must validate archive integrity, member listing, wrapper layout, required boot members, and shell syntax before promotion.
Existing roots may be quarantined only after staged validation passes.
Interrupted extraction must leave the live root unchanged and must not claim restore success.
